chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3038 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) HEARING. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, Addl. P.G. ************* Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and the alternate remedy has been provided; therefore, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the petitioner to approach learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
